name: Obatoclax
description: Obatoclax has been used in trials studying the treatment of AML, Leukemia, Myelofibrosis, Hodgkin's Lymphoma, and Mantle-Cell Lymphoma, among others.
mechanismOfAction: Obatoclax binds anti-apoptotic Bcl-2 proteins and interferes with their ability to interact with pro-apoptotic proteins.
